candidate_definitions.text: 🪀 Lobe CLI Toolbox - AI CLI Toolbox, enhancing git commit and i18n workflow efficiency

Collection of SIMD-accelerated CLI tools for binary & UTF-8-aware text processing with StringZilla combining ICU Functionality, RipGrep Speeds, & External Memory Scale

Internationalization for react done right. Using the i18next i18n ecosystem.
jQuery-i18next is a jQuery based Javascript internationalization library on top of i18next. It helps you to easily internationalize your web applications.

Source can be loaded via [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/jquery-i18next), bower or [downloaded](https://github.com/i18next/jquery-i18next/blob/master/jquery-i18next.min.js) from this repo or from a CDN like [CDNJS](https://cdnjs.com/libraries/jquery-i18next).
A unified, high-performance i18next CLI toolchain, powered by SWC.

Eclipse SUMO is an open source, highly portable, microscopic and continuous traffic simulation package designed to handle large networks. It allows for intermodal simulation including pedestrians and comes with a large set of tools for scenario creation.
i18next-http-middleware is a middleware to be used with Node.js web frameworks like express or Fastify and also for Deno.
📜 i18next-cli plugin to extract Javascript/Typescript from Svelte components
Framework for transforming  Cascading Style Sheets (CSS) from Left-To-Right (LTR) to Right-To-Left (RTL)
The home of the ICU project source code.
This is the repository for the [International Components for Unicode](https://icu.unicode.org/).
Translation tool for Unicodia. Someday it will be more universal.
A simple offline tool for: a) making original text; b) translating it.
A small library to provide the I18n translations on the JavaScript.
unplugin for fluent-vue. Adds support for custom blocks in Vue SFC and external ftl files.

Lua implementation of Project Fluent https://projectfluent.org
Translation support for mdbook. The plugins here give you a structured way to maintain a translated book.
🚀Vite+Vue3+Gin拥有AI辅助的基础开发平台，企业级业务AI+开发解决方案，内置mcp辅助服务，内置skills管理，支持TS和JS混用。它集成了JWT鉴权、权限管理、动态路由、显隐可控组件、分页封装、多点登录拦截、资源权限、上传下载、代码生成器、表单生成器和可配置的导入导出等开发必备功能。
✨ Split text by languages (e.g. 你喜欢看アニメ吗 -> 你喜欢看 | アニメ | 吗) for NLP tasks (e.g. parse, TTS). Powered by fasttext and budoux
⚡️ 80x faster Fasttext language detection out of the box | Split text by language
